reference: I have had this leg pain for five years. It started in my lower back and extends down to just above the ankle. I have managed my pain with pain medication, but I am about to lose access to the pain medication. It gets very painful, and I am at a loss for relief from this pain. I used the Veterans Affairs for my medical needs and really cannot get any help from them. At this point, anything would be helpful.
